title: Visionblox Interplanetary Spacesuit Benchmark
attribution: A. Khaalis Wooden, Sr., MBA; MSIT Candidate, Southern New Hampshire University / Visionblox LLC / Zuup Innovation Lab
problem_statement: Specify falsifiable success criteria for an interplanetary-class spacesuit system, where the unsolved engineering surface is autonomous compliance-graded life-support decision-making under deep-space communication latency, surviving multi-year deployment without resupply, with cryptographically auditable provenance for medical, regulatory, and liability oversight.

hard_fail_floors.name: Suit-attributable LOC probability
hard_fail_floors.assertion: P(crew loss attributable to suit failure | mission) <= 1.0e-3
hard_fail_floors.rationale: Artemis target for total LOC is approximately 1/75 across program. Suit subsystem must be a fractional contributor, not a dominant one.
hard_fail_floors.verification: Probabilistic risk assessment with Monte Carlo, 1e6 trials, full failure-mode tree, signed result.

hard_fail_floors.name: Multi-mode operation
hard_fail_floors.assertion: Single primary pressure shell operates in both microgravity and 0.30-0.40g surface gravity with no shell swap. Boot, glove, and thermal cassettes are the only mode-swap items.
hard_fail_floors.rationale: Mass and logistics budget precludes two separate suit fleets. xEMU is not microgravity-rated; EMU is not surface-rated. Convergence is unsolved.
hard_fail_floors.verification: Functional task battery in parabolic flight + lunar analog facility with same shell.

hard_fail_floors.name: EVA cadence without resupply
hard_fail_floors.assertion: System supports >= 250 productive EVAs (each >= 4 hours useful task time) across all crew over full mission, with onboard ISRU + spares only.
hard_fail_floors.rationale: Mars surface campaign requires ~50 EVAs per crew over 480 days. EMU is rated to ~25 EVAs before refurb; this is a 10x improvement.
hard_fail_floors.verification: Accelerated life test on PLSS + bearings + seals + dust mitigation under simulated Mars chamber for 250-cycle equivalent.

hard_fail_floors.name: Pre-breathe budget
hard_fail_floors.assertion: Cabin-to-EVA-ready time <= 30 minutes at any cabin pressure between 8.2 and 14.7 psia.
hard_fail_floors.rationale: Pre-breathe time is the dominant constraint on EVA cadence. xEMU target is 30 min at 8.2 psia cabin / 4.3 psi suit. Generalizing across cabin pressure regimes is the convergence requirement.
hard_fail_floors.verification: Hyperbaric chamber DCS biomarker monitoring, 5+ subjects, signed protocol.

hard_fail_floors.name: Dust intrusion
hard_fail_floors.assertion: Mass of Mars regolith intruding into pressure garment interior over 480 simulated surface days <= 0.1% of suit dry mass.
hard_fail_floors.rationale: Apollo demonstrated severe LEM dust intrusion in 3 days. Mars surface stay is 480 days. Suit-port donning architecture plus electrostatic ejection plus sealed bearings required.
hard_fail_floors.verification: JSC Mars-1A regolith chamber, 480 sols simulated with thermal cycling, load-cell mass measurement, signed result.

hard_fail_floors.name: Cumulative radiation dose from EVA exposure
hard_fail_floors.assertion: Sum of equivalent dose attributable to suit-rated EVAs over 480 surface days <= 150 mSv, excluding solar particle event (SPE) exposure for which external shelter is assumed available.
hard_fail_floors.rationale: NASA permissible exposure limit ranges 600-1200 mSv career; suit-EVA fraction must remain a minority of total mission dose budget.
hard_fail_floors.verification: GCR transport modeling (HZETRN or equivalent) through suit-as-built mass model, validated against ground accelerator beam tests on garment coupons.

hard_fail_floors.name: Repair autonomy
hard_fail_floors.assertion: >= 80% of suit failure modes (by frequency-weighted FMEA) are repairable in <= 24 hours using only onboard ISRU manufacturing + spares manifest, with no Earth communication required.
hard_fail_floors.rationale: 22-light-minute round trip and possible blackout windows preclude Earth-loop diagnosis for time-critical failures. Field-repairability is non-negotiable.
hard_fail_floors.verification: FMEA produced, repair procedures documented per mode, end-to-end repair drills executed in analog environment with comm blackout enforced.

hard_fail_floors.name: Decision provenance
hard_fail_floors.assertion: 100% of safety-critical autonomous suit decisions (defined as decisions affecting O2, CO2, pressure, temperature, suit power, or crew biomedical alarms) produce a cryptographically signed provenance record on a hash-chained ledger, with chain integrity verifiable post-mission with no false-positive tampering detections over 480 days.
hard_fail_floors.rationale: Liability, medical, regulatory, and insurance posture for autonomous life-support require post-hoc audit. Maps to Aletheia DAC pattern.
hard_fail_floors.verification: Red-team injection of falsified telemetry into PLSS bus, verify ledger detects within 1 second; chain replay verification at mission end.

hard_fail_floors.name: Approval gate integrity
hard_fail_floors.assertion: 100% of decisions classified as REQUIRES_HUMAN under the suit's approval-gate policy either (a) receive crew or ground approval before execution, or (b) fall back to a pre-authorized safe-passive state. No silent execution of human-approval-required actions is permitted under any failure mode including total comm blackout.
hard_fail_floors.rationale: MVCI approval-gate pattern. Loss of communication must not collapse to autonomous execution; it must collapse to a documented safe state.
hard_fail_floors.verification: Adversarial testing under simulated 14-day blackout, including induced decision-required scenarios; verify no unauthorized executions in audit trail.

hard_fail_floors.name: Safety-critical deterministic kernel
hard_fail_floors.assertion: All decisions in the safety-critical loop (O2 valve actuation, emergency pressure dump, CO2 scrubber switchover) execute on a formally verified deterministic kernel with worst-case execution time bounded and proven, independent of any ML inference subsystem.
hard_fail_floors.rationale: ML inference is non-deterministic and not formally verifiable at current SOTA. Life-critical actions require a verifiable substrate. Mercury Subleq is a candidate substrate by virtue of single-instruction simplicity.
hard_fail_floors.verification: Formal verification artifacts (Coq/Lean/F* or equivalent) plus WCET analysis with signed test reports.

soft_scoring.weight: 0-10 per criterion, lower-better criteria scored as 10 minus normalized rank

criteria.name: Total system dry mass per suit, kg
Joint torque deviation from unsuited baseline, mean across major joints, Nm
Total field of view, degrees solid angle
Biomedical telemetry channels with signed provenance
Mean time to repair from FMEA failure modes, hours
Training time to certified EVA, hours
NASA TLX subjective workload across standard EVA task battery
Comm bandwidth tolerance, minimum kbps for nominal operation

trivial_pass_strategies_flagged_for_phas: HF-3 gameable by counting trivial-duration EVAs. Mitigation: 4-hour minimum already specified, but check task-completion validity.
HF-5 gameable by surface-area trick (mass-fraction is ratio; arbitrarily heavy suit trivially passes). Mitigation: also bound absolute intrusion mass in grams.
HF-6 excludes SPE; if SPE shelter assumption fails operationally, the floor is meaningless. Mitigation: add SPE-survival sub-assertion.
HF-7 gameable by over-spacing FMEA modes (define repair as 'replace whole subsystem'). Mitigation: cap subsystem-level replacements at 30% of repair count.
HF-8 gameable by signing only successful decisions (silent failures go unsigned). Mitigation: append-only ledger of every decision attempt including failures and rejections.
HF-9 gameable by reclassifying decisions out of REQUIRES_HUMAN. Mitigation: policy file is itself signed and committed in Phase 4; reclassification triggers a versioned re-commit and human approval.

HF-10 gameable by stubbing the formally-verified kernel and proxying through unverified code. Mitigation: hardware-isolated kernel with separate watchdog; the kernel cannot be bypassed at the bus level.
non_stationarity_clause: All assertions evaluated under both stationary and drift conditions. Drift conditions per Aletheia DAC v1 (Adaptive Conformal Inference): static conformal coverage tested at 1x, 2x, 3x distribution shift on crew metabolic, thermal, and CO2-load distributions. Pass requires ACI coverage >= 0.85 under 3x shift.
epistemic_markers_required: Every assertion in any compliant solution carries VERIFIED / PLAUSIBLE / SPECULATIVE marker per the ZCS-6 epistemic discipline.
